---
title: new
description: Create a new migration file
---

## What it does

Creates a pending migration file in `./damian/.migrations/`. Supply the name inline or omit it for an interactive prompt.

---

## Run

<Tabs groupId='package-manager' persist items={['npm', 'pnpm', 'yarn']}>

```bash tab="npm"
npx damian new
npx damian new my_migration_name
```

```bash tab="pnpm"
pnpm damian new
pnpm damian new my_migration_name
```

```bash tab="yarn"
yarn damian new
yarn damian new my_migration_name
```

</Tabs>

---

## Generated file

File is named `{timestamp}_{slug}.sql` with standard dbmate stubs:

```sql
-- migrate:up


-- migrate:down
```
